name: Residential Air Conditioning
serviceSummary: Custom air conditioning system designs for new home builds and commercial projects, tailored to suit Queensland's weather conditions and your specific needs.
heroImageAlt: Custom air conditioning design and installation for residential projects.
commitmentHeader: Delivering Tailored Air Conditioning Solutions for Residential Projects
commitmentParagraph: At Parker Air Solutions, we design air conditioning systems that cater to the specific requirements of residential spaces. Our expert team ensures every installation is optimised for Queensland's climate, providing reliable, energy-efficient solutions for lasting comfort.
commitmentBullets:
• Custom air conditioning designs for new builds
  • Optimised for Queensland's unique weather conditions
  • Tailored solutions for commercial projects
  • Energy-efficient and reliable installations
  • Expert design and installation for long-lasting performance
whyUsText: Precision and Excellence in Every Installation
step4Text: Whether it's a long-time family home or a new build, we design and deliver reliable systems built for Australian conditions.

name: Commercial Air Conditioning
serviceSummary: Commercial Aircon Installation in South East Queensland – Systems Built for Decades of Performance
heroImageAlt: Professional commercial air conditioning installation for businesses across SEQ.
commitmentHeader: Delivering Operational Freedom through Industrial-Grade Reliability
commitmentParagraph: At Parker Air Solutions, we don't just hang units; we design systems that disappear into the background so you can focus on your business. We combat the "Operational Drain" of rising energy bills and frequent downtime by installing premium Daikin and Mitsubishi systems tailored specifically to the unique heat loads of Queensland commercial spaces.
commitmentBullets:
• Custom-engineered layouts for peak efficiency
  • High-output systems from Daikin and Mitsubishi
  • Seamless installs to eliminate business downtime
  • Industrial-grade durability for South East Queensland's heat
  • Strategic designs focused on long-term energy savings
whyUsText: Precision Engineering for Uninterrupted Business Growth
step4Text: We don't just walk away once the power is on. Our installation process ensures your system is calibrated for peak efficiency, protecting your investment and ensuring your business stays cool and profitable for the long haul.

name: Split System Installations and Changeovers
serviceSummary: Expert installation and changeover of split systems using trusted, high-performance brands. Whether you're upgrading your existing unit or installing a new system, we ensure optimal cooling solutions for homes and businesses.
commitmentHeader: Providing Reliable Split System Installations and Changeovers
commitmentParagraph: We provide top-tier split system installations and changeovers to keep your space cool and comfortable. Using only the best brands, our team ensures every system is installed to perform efficiently and effectively, giving you peace of mind in the harsh Queensland climate.
commitmentBullets:
• Installations and changeovers using trusted brands
  • Tailored solutions for your home or business
  • Efficient installation with minimal disruption
  • Energy-efficient and reliable systems
  • Expertise in split system performance
whyUsText: Precision and Excellence in Every Installation
step4Text: We don't just hang a unit; we strategically calculate the optimal location for maximum airflow and energy efficiency, ensuring your room cools down fast without the "ice-box" effect.

name: Air Conditioning Repairs
serviceSummary: Expert diagnostics and repairs for all leading air conditioning brands, ensuring your system is back up and running quickly and efficiently.
heroImageAlt: Air conditioning repair services for all major brands.
commitmentHeader: Providing Reliable Air Conditioning Repairs for Leading Brands
commitmentParagraph: At Parker Air Solutions, we specialize in diagnosing and repairing air conditioning systems from all leading brands. Our experienced team ensures that your system is back to optimal performance with fast and effective repairs, so you can enjoy comfort without delay.
commitmentBullets:
• Expert diagnostics and repair services
  • Repairs for all major air conditioning brands
  • Quick response to minimise downtime
  • Experienced and knowledgeable technicians
  • Long-term solutions for optimal performance
whyUsText: Precision and Excellence in Every Repair
step4Text: We don't just patch the problem; we identify the root cause to restore your system to peak performance quickly and reliably.

name: Ducted Installation
serviceSummary: Providing professional ducted installation for both new builds and existing homes. We use only trusted brands, including the Airtouch 5 zoning system, ensuring reliable, high-performance solutions that meet Queensland's weather conditions.
heroImageAlt: Ducted air conditioning installation with Airtouch 5 zoning system.
commitmentHeader: Why Choose Parker Air Solutions for Your Ducted Installation?
commitmentParagraph: At Parker Air Solutions, we're committed to delivering top-quality ducted installations that offer year-round comfort. We use premium brands and tailor each system to meet the unique needs of your home or business, ensuring reliable performance and energy efficiency.
commitmentBullets:
• Trusted brands and Airtouch 5 zoning system
  • Custom installations for new builds and existing homes
  • Designed for Queensland weather conditions
  • Professional service with clear communication
  • Reliable, energy-efficient solutions
whyUsText: Precision and Excellence in Every Installation
step4Text: We design high-tech, multi-zone systems that provide total climate control while blending perfectly into the beauty of your home.

name: Routine Maintenance
serviceSummary: Comprehensive routine maintenance for split systems and ducted systems to ensure optimal performance, maintain warranties, improve hygiene, and reduce running costs.
heroImageAlt: Routine air conditioning maintenance for split and ducted systems.
commitmentHeader: Ensuring Your Air Conditioning Runs Smoothly with Routine Maintenance
commitmentParagraph: Regular maintenance is essential for keeping your air conditioning system running efficiently and extending its lifespan. At Parker Air Solutions, we offer thorough inspections and servicing for both split and ducted systems, helping you maintain your warranty, improve hygiene, and lower energy costs.
commitmentBullets:
• Routine maintenance for split and ducted systems
  • Ensures warranty compliance and system efficiency
  • Improves air quality and hygiene
  • Reduces energy consumption and running costs
  • Professional, reliable service
whyUsText: Precision and Excellence in Every Repair
step4Text: Our meticulous deep-cleaning and inspection process extends the life of your unit, ensuring it runs efficiently through every season.
